title: Keystone Patch
description: One patch file under patches/<version>/<NNN>-<name>.json. The patch runner walks every patch whose version directory is strictly greater than the install's recorded keystone_version, in (version asc, filename asc) order.

operations.description: Ordered list of file-level operations to apply.

type.description: The op kind. Per-op fields populated below; see PLAN-1.0.md §5.3 for the contract.

path.description: Slash-separated path under the install dir. For move_* and delete_dir, this is the source; for delete_file and others, the target.

content.description: add_file: the file body to write.

after_heading.description: ensure_section: anchor heading to insert after; empty appends at EOF.

heading.description: ensure_section: the heading line to insert (used for idempotency check).

body.description: ensure_section: body content under the heading.

match.description: replace_block: exact-string match block to replace.

replacement.description: replace_block: replacement block. No-op if already present.
